message:
test(gateway): add comprehensive system routes and tool registry tests

Add 620+ lines of system routes integration tests covering:
- /health endpoint: liveness checks, response format validation
- /health/ready endpoint: dependency availability, degraded state handling
- /metrics endpoint: Prometheus format, metric presence validation
- /version endpoint: version info, build metadata exposure
- Error handling: malformed requests, timeout scenarios

Add 185+ lines of tool registry service unit tests covering:
- Tool registration: valid tools, duplicate detection, invalid schemas
- Tool lookup: by name, by category, wildcard patterns
- Tool execution: parameter validation, timeout handling, error propagation
- Registry lifecycle: initialization, refresh, cache invalidation
- Edge cases: empty registry, missing tools, partial matches

These tests ensure gateway system endpoints and tool registry behavior
remain stable across refactoring and feature additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
